2026 Machine Learning Intern - 2026 NVIDIA Hong Kong, Hong Kong SAR 1 day ago Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning Intern (Entry Level) LeoStoy Tech AI India 2 hours ago 55 applicants See who LeoStoy Tech AI has hired for this role Apply Save Use AI to assess how you fit Get AI-powered advice on this job and more exclusive features. Am I a good fit for this job? Tailor my resume Company Description LeoStoy Tech AI is an innovative AI-driven hiring and staffing company that reshapes the future of recruitment with intelligent technology and human-focused solutions. We empower businesses to find top talent efficiently while providing meaningful career opportunities for job seekers. Our services span AI-based talent acquisition, recruitment solutions. About the Role The Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning Intern will work on AI-driven applications, machine learning models, and data-based solutions. This internship provides hands-on exposure to real-world AI/ML projects, model development, and modern tools used in the industry. Responsibilities Assist in building and training machine learning models. Work on data preprocessing, cleaning, and feature engineering. Analyze datasets to identify trends and patterns. Support AI-based application development and automation tasks. Research and implement AI/ML algorithms for projects. Collaborate with the development team on model testing and optimization. Qualifications Students, freshers, or recent graduates in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, IT, or related fields. Basic understanding of machine learning concepts and analytical thinking. Passion for AI technologies and problem-solving. Required Skills Basic knowledge of Python programming. Understanding of machine learning fundamentals. Familiarity with data analysis and statistics. Knowledge of libraries such as NumPy, Pandas, or Scikit-learn. Preferred Skills Familiarity with TensorFlow, PyTorch, or NLP concepts. Experience with AI projects, datasets, or model training. Basic understanding of deep learning and neural networks. Pay Range and Compensation Package Stipend: 25,000 Internship Completion Certificate. Letter of Recommendation for outstanding performers. PPO opportunity based on performance. Equal Opportunity Statement LeoStoy Tech AI is committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workplace. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and provide equal opportunities regardless of race, gender, religion, disability, or age. Apply now to start your journey in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning with real-world projects and industry-level mentorship.
